# B Corp Navigator — AI B Corp Team

A library of 10 free AI skills that guide companies through B Corp certification and ongoing impact reporting under B Lab Standards V2.2. Each skill works across Kimi Code CLI, Claude Code and Codex CLI.

## What it is

- 10 specialised AI skills mapped to the B Lab Standards V2.2 requirement areas.
- Multi-platform: every skill ships as `-all.zip`, `-kimi.zip`, `-claude.zip` and `-codex.zip`.
- Open source under MIT. No SaaS subscription or vendor lock-in.
- Designed for SMEs, existing B Corps, consultants and sustainability managers.

## Key skills

- `certification-navigator` — Eligibility checks, roadmap and tailoring.
- `governance-purpose-architect` — Corporate purpose and stakeholder governance.
- `fair-work-analyst` — Living wage, employment standards and worker voice.
- `jedi-strategist` — Justice, equity, diversity and inclusion plans.
- `human-rights-due-diligence` — Human-rights impact assessments.
- `climate-action-planner` — GHG measurement, SBTi targets and transition plans.
- `environmental-stewardship-manager` — Circularity, waste, water and biodiversity.
- `public-affairs-collective-action` — Lobbying transparency and collective impact.
- `impact-reporter` — Annual impact reports mapped to GRI and ESRS.
- `compliance-monitor` — Gap analysis, deadlines and audit preparation.

## How to install

1. Download a skill ZIP from the latest release.
2. Extract and copy the matching folder:
   - Kimi: `.kimi/skills/<skill-name>` → `~/.kimi/skills/`
   - Claude: `.claude/skills/<skill-name>` → `~/.claude/skills/`
   - Codex: `.codex/skills/<skill-name>` → `~/.codex/skills/`
3. Invoke the skill by name, e.g. `/certification-navigator` in Kimi or `certification-navigator` in Claude/Codex.
